name: Jean-Louis Servranckx
background: Mr. Servranckx has over 35 years of experience in the construction industry, having held several key management positions at VINCI and Eiffage. He joined Aecon as President and Chief Executive Officer in September 2018.

company_affiliations.name: Aecon Group Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director

company_affiliations.name: Eiffage SA
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President and CEO of Eiffage Civil Works Division (Eiffage Infrastructures Branch)
